patch:
--- a/shifter.v
+++ b/shifter.v
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 module barrel_shifter(
-  input [31:0] data_in,
+  input [15:0] data_in,
   input [3:0] shift_amount,
   input direction,
-  output [31:0] data_out
+  output [15:0] data_out
 );
   assign data_out = direction ? (data_in >> shift_amount) : (data_in << shift_amount);
 endmodule
